rulings.Case Title: IN RE: HO LIVING TRUST ESTABLISHED 9/25, 1990 & AMENDED 1/8/03;1/18/05; 3/31/07; 6/9/07 AND 5/13/13
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Order Compelling Service Of Responses To Discovery And For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Co-Trustees Lolan Ho-Wong and F. Meilan Ho Creger's motion to compel is GRANTED. Wong's discovery responses are due within 45 days of the signed order. Co-Trustees' request for terminating, issue, and contempt sanctions against Lao Chan Wong is denied without prejudice. Counsel for Co-Trustees shall serve a declaration setting forth the number of hours incurred for the motion and reply brief. The declaration shall further state the hourly rate claimed. This declaration shall accompany the proposed order, which prevailing party shall prepare. With respect to the Requests for Admission, the genuineness of the documents and the truth of the matters asserted in the RFAs are deemed admitted. The Co-Trustees' motion to file a supplement to their Cross-Petition is GRANTED. Prevailing party shall prepare one order in conformity to the Court's tentative ruling. Any party wishing to contest the tentative must notify Court and opposing counsel no later than 1/7/2015, at 4:00 p.m.
